TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Maifor, title = Maifor, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maifor} }

S.FORM: Maibul i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Maibul. u kasalumaluma' nu Maibul sa, 108 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 245 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 180 ku tademaw, pakalatu 73%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 65 ku tademaw, pakalatu 27%. u kasabinacadan, Amis 39%, Bunun 3%, Tayal 4%, Paiwan 1%, Sakizaya 25%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: maibur~ɾ i ħuar~ɾiən a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu maibur~ɾ. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu maibur~ɾ sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u kasabinaʦadan, amis **%, bunun *%, tajar~ɾ *%, paiwan *%, sakizaja **%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Maibul i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Maibul. u kasalumaluma' nu Maibul sa, 108 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 245 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 180 ku tademaw, pakalatu 73%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 65 ku tademaw, pakalatu 27%. u kasabinacadan, Amis 39%, Bunun 3%, Tayal 4%, Paiwan 1%, Sakizaya 25%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: maibur~ɾ i ħuar~ɾiən a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu maibur~ɾ. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu maibur~ɾ sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u kasabinaʦadan, amis **%, bunun *%, tajar~ɾ *%, paiwan *%, sakizaja **%, zumazuma *%.
